audit_result.proof_trace: Inclusion proof verification is skipped for ExecutionLayer origin (line 2185), allowing compromised/buggy EL to send data column sidecars with invalid inclusion proofs. Blob sidecars verify inclusion proofs unconditionally (line 1956), proving this skip is inconsistent and breaks defense-in-depth.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Compromised execution layer sends data column sidecar with kzg_commitments that don't match block body_root. CL accepts it because inclusion proof check is skipped for EL origin, potentially serving invalid data to peers or causing consensus divergence.

PROP-6a4369e9-inv-018.text: Merkle inclusion proof must link kzg_commitments to the block body_root.
